steps.title: Take the square root of both sides
steps.content: Starting with $(x-47)^2 = 1$, we take the square root of both sides to eliminate the squared term: $$x - 47 = \pm 1$$

steps.title: Find both solutions and compute their sum
steps.content:
From $x - 47 = \pm 1$, we get:
  • $x - 47 = 1 \Rightarrow x = 48$
  • $x - 47 = -1 \Rightarrow x = 46$
Adding these solutions: $48 + 46 = 94$.
